summary: Complete testing of Sopralluogo Rapido 5-step wizard UX redesign for Perizia Sinistro editor. All 5 steps (Cantiere, Foto, Diagnosi, Misure, Riepilogo) verified with full wizard flow. Navigation, step validation, and all UI components working correctly.

wizard_navigation.5_step_indicator: PASS - All 5 steps (Cantiere, Foto, Diagnosi, Misure, Riepilogo) visible with icons
wizard_navigation.active_step_blue: PASS - Active step shows blue background (#0055FF)
wizard_navigation.completed_step_green: PASS - Completed steps show emerald-50 background with check icon
wizard_navigation.step_click_navigation: PASS - Can click on any step to jump directly

step_1_cantiere.address_fields: PASS - Via/Piazza, Comune, Provincia inputs present
step_1_cantiere.avanti_validation: PASS - Disabled until address or mapPos is set

step_2_foto.foto_panoramica_button: PASS - Blue button with ImagePlus icon (data-testid='btn-foto-panoramica')
step_2_foto.dettaglio_danno_button: PASS - Red button with Focus icon (data-testid='btn-foto-dettaglio')
step_2_foto.ai_analyze_hidden: PASS - AI button not in DOM when no photos

step_3_diagnosi.severity_groups: PASS - 5 groups: STRUTTURALE, ANCORAGGIO, ESTETICO/PROTETTIVO, SICUREZZA, AUTOMAZIONE
step_3_diagnosi.group_colors: PASS - Red, Orange, Blue, Yellow, Purple respectively
step_3_diagnosi.7_damage_tags: PASS - S1-DEF, S2-WELD, A1-ANCH, A2-CONC, P1-ZINC, G1-GAP, M1-FORCE
step_3_diagnosi.tag_selection_ring: PASS - Selected tags show ring-4 effect and check icon
step_3_diagnosi.norme_attivate_section: PASS - Shows EN 1090-2 badge after S1-DEF selection

step_4_misure.prezzo_maggiorato_calc: PASS - Shows calculated 'Prezzo maggiorato: XXX.XX EUR/ml'
step_4_misure.crea_e_calcola_button: PASS - Shows for new perizia instead of 'Avanti'

step_5_riepilogo.computo_metrico_table: PASS - Cost table with A.01, B.01, C.01, D.01, E.01, F.01 items

full_wizard_flow.create_perizia: PASS - Created PER-2026/0001 with total 2355.00 EUR
full_wizard_flow.cost_calculation: PASS - 6 voci_costo items generated correctly based on S1-DEF, P1-ZINC

backend_verification.GET /api/perizie/{id}: PASS - Returns perizia with correct data

critical_code_review_comments: Wizard implementation is clean with proper step state management (step 0-4)
canNext() validation correctly enforces step requirements
goNext() properly handles 'Crea e Calcola' flow for new perizia
Step indicators use data-testid attributes consistently for all 5 steps
GPS Auto uses navigator.geolocation + Nominatim reverse geocoding correctly
Photo upload uses FileReader for base64 encoding (max 5 photos)
AI tag suggestions parsed from analysis text using keyword matching
All quick action buttons have proper data-testid attributes
Cost table dynamically renders voci_costo with correct formatting
seed_data_creation: Created test perizia PER-2026/0001 (per_92d7369d7531) with S1-DEF and P1-ZINC codes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sopralluogo Rapido wizard fully tested. Key details: 1) /perizie/new loads 5-step wizard (Cantiere, Foto, Diagnosi, Misure, Riepilogo). 2) Step indicators clickable for navigation. 3) Step validation enforced (address→photos→tags→modules). 4) Step 4 shows 'Crea e Calcola' for new perizia. 5) After save, redirects to /perizie/{id} with PDF and Share buttons. 6) Backend unchanged from iteration_30. 7) Created test perizia PER-2026/0001 with 2355.00 EUR total.
